name: BMM_CONTAINER_TYPE
documentation: Type reference that specifies containers with one generic parameter.

container_type.name: container_type
container_type.documentation: The type of the container. This converts to the root_type in BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.

base_type.name: base_type
base_type.documentation: The target type; this converts to the first parameter in generic_parameters in BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.
